summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Flow Consulting website completed successfully. All core features operational including homepage with particle animations, report catalog with filtering, cart functionality, form submissions, and Stripe checkout integration. Backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly with MongoDB seeded data.

ui_bugs.issue: Table of Contents toggle selector timeout - may be a timing issue with modal rendering

passed_tests: Backend API: All 15 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, particle canvas, animated stat counters
Featured Reports section displays 6 report cards with images, prices, View Report button
Report Catalog section with search, industry/category/price filters working
Report Detail Modal opens with full report details, key findings, license pricing options
Add to Cart functionality - cart icon updates count, cart drawer shows items
Cart drawer shows items with remove button, total price, and Checkout button
Checkout creation API working (Stripe integration validated)
Industries section shows all 12 industry cards, clicking filters catalog
How It Works section - 4 steps displayed correctly
Why Choose Us - 6 feature cards working
Client Logos marquee and 3 testimonials displaying properly
Custom Research form submits successfully to /api/custom-research
Newsletter email subscribe form submits to /api/newsletter
Global search overlay - opens on search icon click, shows matching results
Sample download modal - opens on download click, captures email
PDF generation working for sample downloads
Footer section with navigation columns, social links, copyright
Catalog pagination and filtering systems working
Toast notifications working for cart additions and form submissions
